rules.reason: Trial security suites often expire, add startup load, and confuse customers. Confirm replacement/security status first.
rules.notes: Never disable Microsoft Defender as part of this action.

rules.reason: OEM support apps may be useful for warranty/driver lookup but can add background services.
rules.notes: Technician should decide per customer device.

rules.reason: Consumer games are commonly unwanted on work or school PCs.
rules.notes: Remove only selected packages; never remove Store framework dependencies.

rules.reason: OneDrive may contain active customer sync and backup data.
rules.notes: Do not remove without explicit customer approval and data verification.
